mapper.select: SELECT ANSWER_NO , CONTENT , USER_NAME , CREATE_DATE , UPDATED , BOARD_NO , USER_ID FROM QUESTION_ANSWER JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON USER_ID = USER_ID WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY COMMENT_NO ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE QUESTION_ANSWER SET CONTENT = #{content} , UPDATED = 'EDITED' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND ANSWER_NO = #{answerNo} AND DELETED = 'N'
UPDATE QUESTION_ANSWER SET DELETED = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND ANSWER_NO = #{answerNo}
mapper.select: SELECT QA.ANSWER_NO , QA.CONTENT , USER_NAME , QA.CREATE_DATE , QA.UPDATED , QA.BOARD_NO , QA.USER_ID FROM QUESTION_ANSWER QA JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON PU.USER_ID = QA.USER_ID WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND QA.DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY ANSWER_NO ASC
